---
title: "6 Data Visualization in R"
format: html
---

### Lecture 11: Data Visualization in R - 1 {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;"}
<iframe
    src="/week6/data_vis1/data_vis1.html"
    width="700"
    height="480"
    style="border:1px solid #ddd; display:block;"
    allowfullscreen
  ></iframe>
:::

[Open slides in a new window](/week6/data_vis1/data_vis1.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
[Download the Slides](/week6/data_vis1/data_vis1.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} 
:::


### Video Lecture 11: Data Visualization in R - 1 {.unnumbered}

<video width="700" controls>
  <source src="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/zwwmc0myak22wg27xvkxk/video.mp4?rlkey=k6ac5akzrl25cvomm2s8tt13z&raw=1" type="video/mp4">
</video>


::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
[Watch the Video](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/zwwmc0myak22wg27xvkxk/video.mp4?rlkey=k6ac5akzrl25cvomm2s8tt13z&raw=1){target="_blank"}
:::



### Lecture 12: Data Visualization in R - 2 {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;"}
<iframe
    src="/week6/data_vis2/data_vis2.html"
    width="700"
    height="480"
    style="border:1px solid #ddd; display:block;"
    allowfullscreen
  ></iframe>
:::

[Open slides in a new window](/week6/data_vis2/data_vis2.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::


::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
[Download the Slides](/week6/data_vis2/data_vis2.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} 
:::


### Video Lecture 12: Data Visualization in R - 2 {.unnumbered}

<video width="700" controls>
  <source src="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dg2slbswa5gvlgap4v8nx/video.mp4?rlkey=7no4z0nan34v0crezglxfs0ys&raw=1" type="video/mp4">
</video>


::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
[Watch the Video](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dg2slbswa5gvlgap4v8nx/video.mp4?rlkey=7no4z0nan34v0crezglxfs0ys&raw=1){target="_blank"}
:::



### Lecture 13: Data Visualization in R - 3 {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto;"}
<iframe
    src="/week6/data_vis3/data_vis3.html"
    width="700"
    height="480"
    style="border:1px solid #ddd; display:block;"
    allowfullscreen
  ></iframe>
:::

[Open slides in a new window](/week6/data_vis3/data_vis3.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::


::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
[Download the Slides](/week6/data_vis3/data_vis3.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} 
:::

### Video Lecture 13: Data Visualization in R - 3 {.unnumbered}

<video width="700" controls>
  <source src="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/mhb4tkq0gx6bq7aaqflfq/video.mp4?rlkey=bhgqn9tzg3xqown3ck9lo4xmb&st=te3iyonb&raw=1" type="video/mp4">
</video>


::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
[Watch the Video](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/mhb4tkq0gx6bq7aaqflfq/video.mp4?rlkey=bhgqn9tzg3xqown3ck9lo4xmb&st=te3iyonb&raw=1){target="_blank"}
:::
